name: Precision Drilling Corporation
description: Precision Drilling Corporation is a leading provider of contract drilling, completion, and production services to the oil, natural gas, and geothermal industries. Founded in 1951 and headquartered in Calgary, Canada, the company operates a significant fleet of high-performance drilling rigs across North America and international markets. Precision Drilling is recognized as the largest drilling rig contractor in Canada, focusing on delivering safe, sustainable, and technologically advanced solutions. Through its commitment to operational excellence and high-value services, the company helps exploration and production clients reduce risks and costs at well sites globally.
